MegaTag.description: A schema defining the structure and properties of a MegaTag.

type.description: The type of MegaTag, indicating its purpose.

attributes.description: Key-value pairs representing additional attributes of the MegaTag.

created_at.description: Timestamp indicating when the MegaTag was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp indicating the last time the MegaTag was updated.

MegaTagCollection.description: A schema defining a collection of MegaTags.

collection_id.description: Unique identifier for the MegaTag collection.

tags.description: Array of MegaTags belonging to this collection.

created_at.description: Timestamp indicating when the collection was created.
